Static in-browser prototype

Runtime Workbench

Runtime Workbench - static in-browser prototype. No backend writes. No real execution.

MVP-52 No backend writes No real execution In-memory only

The export uses a local blob download only. It never calls fetch, never stores state, and never talks to a backend.

Prototype guardrails
No fetch No XHR No realtime sockets No storage APIs
Requests 0 Queued in memory
Pending approvals 0 Awaiting action
Audit events 0 Rendered timeline

Workbench controls

Build a request, classify risk, and preview the dry run

Request builder

Compose an in-memory request, inspect the selected action, and queue the review path without touching any backend surface.

Risk classifier

Low
low
Action registry entry -

    Execution boundary

    Approval queue

    Pending requests with approve and deny actions
